followSteps: Follow the steps to connect your device to your Wi-Fi network.
youAreConnectedToBoard: You are now connected to your map.
selectHomeWifiFromList: Select your home Wi-Fi network from the list below and enter its Wi-Fi password to connect your map to the internet.
noWifiNetworksFound: No Wi-Fi networks found. Please try again.
errorScanningWifi: Error scanning Wi-Fi networks. Please try again.
wifiConnectedSuccessfully: The map successfully connected to your WiFi network. Please connect the device running this browser back to the internet to continue.
errorConnectingToWifi: Could not connect to the WiFi network. Please check your password and try again.
deviceIdentificationTriggered: Your map should now light up green! If not, check you are connected to the correct LEDTransit Wi-Fi network and start over.
errorIdentifyingDevice: Error triggering device identification. Please try again.
missingToken: Missing setup token in URL. Please restart the setup process and use the provided link to navigate to this page.
